data.title: The Bhutanese government transferred 123.7 BTC, worth $8.5 million, to a new address.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, the Bhutanese government transferred 123.7 BTC to a new address, worth $8.5 million.

data.title: Chainlink Reserve Expands with Significant LINK Addition
data.description:
Chainlink has announced a substantial increase in its reserve holdings, adding 131,905.93 LINK tokens, valued at over $1.1 million. According to Foresight News, this brings the total reserve to 2,795,491.19 LINK, worth approximately $24.88 million.

The Chainlink Reserve is designed to support the network's long-term growth and sustainability. The reserve's LINK tokens are sourced from off-chain revenue generated by large-scale enterprise adoption and on-chain revenue from service usage.

data.title: Iranian President: Iran will continue its legitimate and forceful defense.
data.description: According to a report by the Islamic Republic News Agency (IRNA) on the 26th, Iranian President Pezechzian, in a phone call with Iraqi President Rashid, emphasized Iran's determination to continue its legitimate and forceful defense against all acts of aggression. Pezechzian stated that Iran has the right to legitimately defend itself against US military bases in the region, which he sees as the source of aggression, and called for vigilance against the conspiracy of the US and Israel to "invade Iran through armed force and the use of terrorist organizations, leveraging neighboring territories, thereby creating division and instability among Islamic countries." (Xinhua)

data.title: Iranian President Asserts Right to Defense Against Regional Aggression
data.description: Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi emphasized Iran's determination to continue legitimate and robust defense measures against any acts of aggression during a conversation with Iraqi President Abdul Latif Rashid, according to Odaily. Raisi stated that Iran has the right to defend itself against U.S. military bases in the region, which he identified as sources of aggression. He also urged vigilance against plots by the U.S. and Israel to create division and instability among Islamic nations through military force and the use of terrorist organizations, leveraging neighboring territories to invade Iran.

data.title: Global Market Uncertainty May Impact Asian Private Equity Investments
data.description:
Recent reports indicate that the ongoing unrest in Iran is introducing new uncertainties that could dampen the nascent recovery in Asian private equity investments. According to BlockBeats, industry experts have expressed concerns that the situation may lead to a slowdown in investment activities similar to the tariff issues experienced early last year. Andrew Thompson, KPMG's Asia-Pacific Head of Asset Management and Private Equity, noted that the current environment is causing investors to pause, slow down, and adopt a wait-and-see approach to avoid sudden shocks.

In light of increasing uncertainty, Middle Eastern investment funds, which are significant contributors to global private equity, may also temporarily reduce their foreign investment activities, at least in the short term. Thompson emphasized that now is not the time for financing explorations, as investors need to address more pressing issues.

A report released this week by Bain & Company highlights that funds raised by private equity firms focusing on Asian markets fell to their lowest level in nearly a decade last year, totaling only $58 billion. This marks the fourth consecutive year of declining funds.

data.title: OpenAI Invests in AI Startup Isara for Advanced Software Development
data.description:
OpenAI has invested in Isara, an artificial intelligence startup founded by two 23-year-old researchers. According to ChainCatcher, Isara aims to develop software capable of coordinating thousands of AI agents to tackle complex issues in fields such as finance and biotechnology.

Isara recently completed a funding round, raising $94 million at a valuation of $650 million. Investors include Michael Ovitz and Stanley Druckenmiller, with OpenAI participating in the round. The founders of Isara published an academic paper in June of last year, proposing the use of AI systems to enhance policy-making through collaboration.

The company has recruited approximately 12 researchers from major tech firms like Google, Meta, and OpenAI. Isara plans to initially market its predictive modeling software to investment institutions and has demonstrated its capability to coordinate around 2,000 AI agents for predicting gold prices.

data.title: Tron Allegedly Accumulates TRX with Over $200 Million Held
data.description: Tron, a company listed on Nasdaq, is reportedly purchasing its native cryptocurrency, TRX. According to NS3.AI, a suspected Tron address currently holds more than $200 million worth of TRX. It is reported that a significant portion of these holdings is staked. Tron has been consistently acquiring approximately $50,000 of TRX daily over the past two months.

data.title: Security Flaw Found in Claude Chrome Extension
data.description:
A critical vulnerability has been identified in the Claude Chrome extension, affecting versions below 1.41. According to ChainCatcher, GoPlus cited a report from Koi highlighting this issue.

The flaw allows attackers to exploit malicious web pages that silently load iframes containing cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities. These can execute harmful payloads within the a-cdn.claude.ai subdomain, which is on the extension's trusted whitelist. This enables attackers to send and automatically execute malicious prompts to the Claude extension without user consent or interaction, leaving victims unaware.

The vulnerability could allow attackers to manipulate the Claude extension to access users' Google Drive documents, steal business access tokens, or export chat logs. Additionally, it could enable the takeover of current browser sessions to perform sensitive actions, such as sending emails, impersonating the victim.

GoPlus advises users to update the Claude extension to version 1.41 or higher immediately and to remain vigilant against phishing links.

data.title: The yield on Japan's 10-year government bonds rose to 2.380%, a new high since January 20.
data.description: The yield on Japan's 10-year government bonds rose to 2.380%, a new high since January 20. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale, which had been dormant for six months, withdrew 7.5 million ATER tokens from Binance, worth $5.02 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, after a six-month hiatus, a whale withdrew 7.5 million ATER tokens from Binance, worth $5.02 million.

data.title: EX.IO Introduces Three New Tokenized Securities Products
data.description: EX.IO, a licensed virtual asset trading platform, has announced the launch of three new compliant tokenized securities products. According to Ming Pao, these products are backed by underlying assets that include bond funds, short-term liquidity notes, and U.S. Treasury bills. The asset managers for these products are Jinzhou Asset Management, Cinda International Asset Management, and BNY Mellon.

data.title: Xiaomi MiMo Predicts Significant Model Token Growth
data.description: Luo Fuli, head of Xiaomi MiMo's large model division, has projected that model token growth could increase by 100 times this year, following a nearly tenfold growth in the previous period. According to NS3.AI, Luo emphasized that the upcoming competitive focus might shift towards advancements in computing power, inference chips, and energy efficiency.

data.title: GANA Integrates Conflux Bitunion to Enhance Global Payment Infrastructure
data.description:
On March 27, GANA announced its integration with Conflux Bitunion's payment solution, aiming to expand its infrastructure capabilities within the global payment network. According to BlockBeats, this move is set to accelerate the deep integration of Web3 payments with the traditional financial system, with the functionality expected to go live on April 15.

GANA, as a new generation of revenue-oriented Web3 payment infrastructure, focuses on transforming payment actions into value creation. It employs mechanisms driven by on-chain contracts to redefine the user's role within the payment system, introducing an innovative 'payment as revenue' model.

With this integration, GANA now supports payment and settlement capabilities in several major fiat currencies, including USD and GBP, enhancing cross-border transaction efficiency and global user reach.

data.title: Justin Sun Discusses Blockchain Commitment and AI Adoption
data.description:
On March 27, Justin Sun addressed his steadfast commitment to the blockchain industry, emphasizing that enduring elements are supported by genuine demand. According to BlockBeats, Sun noted that while market cycles fluctuate, the need for more efficient and open financial infrastructure remains constant.

When asked about making decisive, high-stakes decisions, Sun highlighted three key considerations: market trends, competitive landscape, and risk-reward ratio. He cited the collaboration between Tron and Tether, which introduced the TRC-20 version of USDT on the Tron network, as a prime example. Sun stressed the importance of aligning with strong trends and choosing the right partners.

Regarding the AI trend, Sun advised against hesitation and encouraged immediate adoption. He suggested viewing AI as an amplifier rather than a replacement, enhancing one's cognition and judgment. Embracing AI, according to Sun, should not replace personal growth but rather act as an accelerator on top of it. He concluded that while time is equal for everyone, those who effectively utilize tools experience time differently.

data.title: India's CBI Arrests Suspect in Myanmar Crypto Scam Network
data.description: India's Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has apprehended Sunil Nellathu Ramakrishnan, a resident of Mumbai, on allegations of directing Indian victims to scam operations in Myanmar. According to NS3.AI, the victims were transported via Bangkok to locations such as KK Park in Myawaddy, where they encountered confinement, mistreatment, and restricted movement. The CBI is actively investigating a broader network that extends into Myanmar and Cambodia.

data.title: AI Development Spurs Competition in Computing Power
data.description: At the 2026 Zhongguancun Forum's AI Open Source Frontier Forum, Xiaomi's MiMo model leader, Luo Fuli, discussed the rapid advancements in large models. According to Odaily, Luo highlighted that due to the swift progress of large models and the support of improved agent frameworks, there is a significant increase in inference demands. Luo noted that this year has already seen nearly a tenfold growth in certain areas. The question remains whether the growth in tokens will reach a hundredfold this year, leading to a new dimension of competition focused on computing power, inference chips, and even energy.

data.title: Binance Futures updates traditional asset perpetual contract trading fee discounts
data.description: Binance Futures will update its trading fee discount promotion for all traditional asset perpetual contracts. During the promotion period, Binance users from Regular to VIP 9 will enjoy zero order placement fees when trading any traditional asset perpetual contract. In addition, Regular to VIP 3 users will enjoy a 20% discount on taker fees, and VIP 4 to VIP 9 users will enjoy a 50% discount on taker fees (compared to standard USDT taker fees). Promotion period: March 31, 2026, 10:00 AM to May 26, 2026, 10:00 AM (UTC+8).

data.title: Xiaomi MiMo's head of large-scale model: Token growth may reach 100 times this year.
data.description: At the AI ​​Open Source Frontier Forum of the "Artificial Intelligence Theme Day" at the 2026 Zhongguancun Forum Annual Meeting, Luo Fuli, head of Xiaomi MiMo's large-scale model, stated, "In the longer term, due to the rapid progress of large-scale models themselves, and with the support of a better agent framework, we can see our inference needs. I believe that what has already happened this year is that there has been nearly a 10-fold increase in the past period. So, will the overall token growth reach 100 times this year? Then we have entered another dimension of competition, which is computing power, or inference chips, and even down to energy." (Jinshi)

data.title: WhiteWhale Drops Over 55% as Key Trader Exits Crypto Twitter
data.description: WhiteWhale's value plummeted by more than 55%, reaching approximately $0.012, following an announcement from the pseudonymous trader who spearheaded the community takeover. According to NS3.AI, the trader revealed plans to step away from Crypto Twitter. Additionally, the trader disclosed that 500 million WHITEWHALE tokens, representing half of the token's fixed supply of 1 billion, have been permanently locked.

data.title: Tether's XAUT Withdrawals Surge Amid Gold Price Drop
data.description: On March 27, two significant wallets moved over $12.3 million worth of XAUT into self-custody. According to NS3.AI, this activity coincided with a decline in spot gold prices to $4,447 per ounce. The withdrawals followed Tether's announcement that XAUT now operates natively on the BNB Chain.
